mapper.update: UPDATE bank_process SET resend_schedule_day_start = #{resendScheduleDayStart}, resend_schedule_day_end = #{resendScheduleDayEnd}, resend_schedule_frequency = #{resendScheduleFrequency}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
UPDATE bank_process SET resend_schedule_day_start = NULL, resend_schedule_day_end = NULL, resend_schedule_frequency = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
